component.name: Job Summary Card
component.description: Compact earnings breakdown: line items (Revenue, Materials, optional Fees), bordered Net Earnings row. Default Figma layout has no section heading above the breakdown (`258:1549`).

layoutSemantics.Default (3 lines): Revenue, Materials, Fees rows; net total success green; total row top border Foundation/Border/Default.
layoutSemantics.2 Lines: Revenue and Materials only (omit fees); net total green; total border Default.
layoutSemantics.Negative: Fees row included when applicable; net Brand/Primary; total row top border Foundation/Border/Subtle.

codeProps.title: optional; omit for Figma default (no heading)
codeProps.revenue: label, value, optional valuePrefix, optional valueTone
codeProps.fees: omit null for 2-line layout (no fees row)
codeProps.total: label (default Net Earnings), value, valuePrefix optional, sentiment positive|negative (controls net color and total row border token)

notes: 2026-03-28: Figma variant axis renamed from `Property 1` to `Layout`.
2026-04-10: Renamed structural wrappers to kebab-case `job-summary-card-*` and mirrored them with `data-name` hooks in TSX.

2026-04-11: Figma update — no default section heading; row labels Typography/Body-Bold + Foundation/Text/Secondary; net row border Default when sentiment positive, Subtle when negative; `job-summary-card-total-value-amount` on amount span.
Figma ‘Inter’ on currency glyph is cosmetic; row values Typography/Body-Bold (Ubuntu Sans Mono).
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `258:1549` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Net Earnings row in each layout variant renamed from `job-summary-card-row` to `job-summary-card-total` with `job-summary-card-total-label`, `job-summary-card-total-value`, `job-summary-card-total-value-prefix`, `job-summary-card-total-value-amount` to match `JobSummaryCard.tsx` and `structure.figmaLayerNames`. No `flatten()` in automation.
